name: Working Solutions CDFI
description_short: Working Solutions CDFI is a free credit assistance provider based in San Francisco, California. Rated 3.8/5 with 25 Google reviews, reflecting solid customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Working Solutions CDFI is a free credit assistance provider serving clients in San Francisco, California. Carrying a 3.8/5.0 Google rating from 25 reviews, Working Solutions CDFI has an solid reputation among consumers in the San Francisco area looking to access free credit counseling and financial guidance.

Working Solutions CDFI specializes in free credit assistance services designed to help consumers access free credit counseling and financial guidance. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Non-profit and free credit assistance providers in San Francisco offer valuable resources for consumers who need help but may not be able to afford paid services. Working Solutions CDFI provides an important community service, and consumers should verify the organization's non-profit status and HUD-approval where applicable. Free counseling sessions can be a good starting point before committing to paid credit repair or debt relief programs.

Consumers in the San Francisco, California area who are considering Working Solutions CDFI should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any free credit assistance provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
